ddls:
CREATE TABLE "texture_types" (
  "texture_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each texture type */,
  "texture_name" TEXT /* Name of the texture type (e.g., diffuse, normal, specular) */,
  "texture_description" TEXT /* Description of the texture type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("texture_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "texture_format_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "texture_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the texture type */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compressed format */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project using the format */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the format was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_texture_format_usage_texture_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("texture_type_id") REFERENCES texture_types ("texture_type_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each texture type
Name of the texture type (e.g., diffuse, normal, specular)
Unique identifier for each usage event
ID of the project using the format
Date when the format was used
